name: crux
description: Personal project manager with CPM, ROI tracking, and local LLM routing. Works for code repos, articles, research, and freelance work.
long_description: crux is a hybrid project manager: run it as a plain CLI (free, no AI), ask a local LLM for simple reasoning (free, local), or let Claude use it via MCP for heavy strategic thinking. Tracks tasks, dependencies, sessions, and ROI across all your projects in a single global SQLite database.

tools.name: crux_init
tools.description: Bootstrap DB for current repo; optionally install SKILL.md

tools.name: crux_status
tools.description: Structured JSON: task counts, next unblocked tasks, blockers

tools.name: crux_overview
tools.description: All projects: status, ROI, active count, spread warning

tools.name: crux_cpm
tools.description: Run CPM forward/backward pass, return critical path + float values

tools.name: crux_task_add
tools.description: Add a task to the current project

tools.name: crux_task_update
tools.description: Mark task start/done/blocked with optional note (audit logged)

tools.name: crux_dep_add
tools.description: Add predecessor→successor dependency edge

tools.name: crux_sync
tools.description: Dry-run or apply GitHub Issues ↔ DB reconciliation

tools.name: crux_report
tools.description: Generate tasks.md, docs/status-{date}.md, or docs/adr/*.md

tools.name: crux_ready
tools.description: Release readiness go/no-go check against all phase gates

tools.name: crux_graph
tools.description: Return ASCII dependency DAG or DOT format

tools.name: crux_test_run
tools.description: Record build/test pass-fail + coverage; auto-close task if coverage target met

tools.name: crux_milestone_check
tools.description: Detect phase completions → generate milestone doc + open GH issue

tools.name: crux_session_start
tools.description: Start a time-tracking session for the current project

tools.name: crux_session_end
tools.description: End session and log minutes elapsed

tools.name: crux_roi_record
tools.description: Log revenue or cost against a project

tools.name: crux_roi_report
tools.description: ROI analysis JSON: score, hours, signals

tools.name: crux_spread_check
tools.description: Active project count + focus health warning

tools.name: crux_project_add
tools.description: Register a new project of any type

tools.name: crux_project_link
tools.description: Link current repo directory to an existing project

tools.name: crux_ask
tools.description: Route a natural-language question to the local LLM with DB context injected
